title: phyllanthus nutans
intro: Phyllanthus nutans, also known as the dwarf phyllanthus or cloud nut, is a type of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Phyllanthus nutans include its potential to reduce liver damage, improve immune function, and exhibit antiviral activity against the hepatitis B virus. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus nutans can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used in traditional medicine to support liver health and overall well-being.
